pair_derivation.note: 2284 observations from 2-outcome counting per market. P22 used 2499 (3-outcome for MNL). Delta=215 is methodological, not data loss.

mean_ci_95.interpretation: 95% CI crosses zero. Mean is not statistically distinguishable from zero at 5% significance.

positive_rate_ci_95.interpretation: Positive rate CI [34.2%, 38.2%] — below 50% threshold, consistent with noise.

bootstrap_analysis.interpretation_trimmed: After 5%/10% trim, mean collapses to near-zero. Gross mean driven by extreme tails.

classification_criteria.ROBUST: CI fully positive AND sign-stable after outlier removal
classification_criteria.WEAK_STABLE: CI does not cross zero AND mean positive after outlier removal
classification_criteria.INCONCLUSIVE: CI crosses zero OR sign changes after outlier removal
classification_criteria.NEGATIVE: Mean negative AND sign-stable after outlier removal
classification_criteria.actual: INCONCLUSIVE — CI crosses zero [-0.0186, 0.7764]; trimmed mean ~0.01%; outlier top-1% contributes 110.57% of total CLV sum

signal_verdict: The WBC 2026 CLV signal at the overall level is INCONCLUSIVE. The positive gross mean (+0.36%) is a statistical artifact of a small number of extreme outlier observations. The underlying distribution is approximately symmetric around zero with a large neutral mass (27.7%). No robust positive edge is detectable.
